branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Gravity / black-hole observable; matter-side per Einstein-eq source coupling

description: Hawking-spectrum detail of the relational defect black hole. Distilled from outputs_black_hole_thermo/bht08_hawking_spectrum_detail.json (Bose/Fermi greybody-factor sweep at x=omega/T in {0.2, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8}; Page energy-fractions; Hawking luminosity; evaporation time). Both regimes are bundled.
framing: The Hawking spectrum follows the standard Bose/Fermi distributions n(x) = 1/(e^x +/- 1) with greybody factors Gamma_l. The Page-curve scalar/fermion/vector fractions of the radiation energy are 16.5% / 68.5% / 15.0% respectively (consistent with the standard 4d greybody result). The evaporation time t_evap is parametrically much longer than the cosmological horizon time at the lattice's M_BH ~ 10^58 GeV; the bundled value is for traceability of the BHT-08 output.
spectrum_normalization: n_bose = 1/(e^x - 1), n_fermi = 1/(e^x + 1) at unit greybody factor Gamma_l = 1. The full bundled spectrum_canonical of the upstream BHT-08 file additionally tabulates dE_boson_rel and dE_fermion_rel with full greybody-factor weighting for nine x-points; the same shape is reproduced in this bundled subset.
